Akabor.name: Akabor
Akabor.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Thrones
Akabor.teaser: THE WOLVES ARE NOW IN YOUR MIDST, EVEN AMONG THE GOOD PEOPLE. As I said before, they are even under the form of bishops, and higher still, in the cardinals.

Allida.name: Allida
Allida.title: Anglic Demon, Choir of Archangels
Allida.teaser: THERE HAS NEVER BEEN SUCH CONFUSION AS THERE IS NOW. We also know what is in the Apocalypse.

Angela.name: Bl. Angela of Foligno
Angela.title: Teacher of Theologians
Angela.teaser: The world is full of blindness, and many believe they see, yet they walk in darkness. Those who should be examples of holiness do not live according to the truth, and thus many are scandalized.
Angela.book: The Book of the Divine Consolation of Blessed Angela of Foligno

Angels.name: The Angels
Angels.title: At the service of Mankind
Angels.teaser: The Holy Archangels D: We know that above us and above Hell stands Saint Michael the Archangel. To his right, we see Saint Jehudiel the Archangel, to his left Saint Barachiel the Archangel, and scattered here and there, the seven Archangels who complete his left and right sides.

Anneliese.name: Annelise Michel
Anneliese.teaser: It actually is like this... it is not that bad, but when it is as cold as it was during the week, that, I was shaken a lot.

Beelzebub.name: Beelzebub
Beelzebub.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Beelzebub.teaser: WE WERE IMMENSELY HAPPY TO SEE THAT THINGS WERE NOT GOING WELL FOR THE BOOK. We had hoped that the book would fail before it even saw the light of day.

Beelzebub2.name: Beelzebub
Beelzebub2.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Beelzebub2.teaser: WELCOME, I AM BEELZEBUB, THE GREAT ANGEL-DEMON Many things are possible for me, that is to say, everything that belongs to the realm of the earth... You must quote my name, with the other demons too, you must always indicate who spoke.

Bridget.name: St. Bridget of Sweden
Bridget.title: The Prophetess of the North
Bridget.teaser: The people of this world love darkness more than light. They follow their own will rather than mine.

Carl.name: Rev Carl E. Schmöger
Carl.title: Compiler and Author
Carl.book: The Life and Revelations of Anne Catherine Emmerich

Catherine.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations
Catherine.book2: The Life of the Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine2.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine2.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine2.book: The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine3.name: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine3.title: The Mystic of Münster
Catherine3.teaser: Very bad times will come when non-Catholics will lead many people astray. A great confusion will result.
Catherine3.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations, The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

Catherine4.name: Forward
Catherine4.title: St. Catherine Emmerich
Catherine4.book: The Life of Jesus Christ and Biblical Revelations, The Life of The Blessed Virgin Mary

CatherineR.name: St. Catherine deâ€™ Ricci
CatherineR.title: The Ecstatic of Prato
CatherineR.book: Life of St. Catherine deâ€™ Ricci

CatherineS.name: St. Catherine of Siena
CatherineS.title: The Seraphic Virgin
CatherineS.teaser: So I say to thee, that in Hell, the souls have four principal torments, out of which proceed all the other torments.

Children.name: The Children of Fatima
Children.title: The Little Shepherds
Children.teaser: Our Lady showed us a great sea of fire which seemed to be under the earth.

Clemens.name: Clemens Brentano
Clemens.title: The Pilgrim - Compiler and Author
Clemens.book: The Life and Revelations of Anne Catherine Emmerich

Dominic.name: The Rosary 1206
Dominic.title: St. Dominic, The Joyful Friar
Dominic.teaser: Dominic was preaching the Rosary near Carcassone, an Albigensian was brought to him who was possessed by the Devil. The Saint exorcised him in the presence of a great crowd of people; it appears that over 12,000 had come to hear him speak.
Dominic.voice: Shadow - Thriller Voice, Eerie Whisper, Psychological Dread

Elisabeth.name: St. Elisabeth of Schönau
Elisabeth.title: The Earthen Vessel
Elisabeth.teaser: In those days many will abandon the path of truth and follow their own desires, turning away from the commandments of God. The teachers of the people will become blind, and those who should guide will themselves fall into error, leading many with them.

Exorcist.name: The Exorcist
Exorcist.title: In Persona Christi
Exorcist.teaser: We priests command you, as representatives of Christ, in the name of the Most Holy Trinity, the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit.

Exorcist2.name: The Rosary 1975
Exorcist2.teaser: J: I am still required to say this (he sighs heavily): the bulk of the priests are blind. But, with a little good will and much prayer to the Holy Spirit, they would in the course of time, regain their sight.

Exorcist3.name: The Rosary 1976
Exorcist3.teaser: E: It is the month of the Rosary, you know that, right? D: Yes, but only the fewest pray.

Exorcist4.name: The Rosary 2019
Exorcist4.teaser: E: O Virgin, today is your feast, that of the Holy Rosary. I would like this "B" to give us a catechesis on the holy rosary.

Faustina.name: St. Faustina
Faustina.title: The Secretary of Divine Mercy
Faustina.teaser: Today, I was led by an Angel to the chasms of hell. It is a place of great torture; how awesomely large and extensive it is!

Frances.name: St. Frances of Rome
Frances.title: The Angel of Rome
Frances.teaser: Above the door of the abyss was marked this inscription: "This place is hell.

Gemma.name: St. Gemma Galgani
Gemma.title: The Flower of Lucca
Gemma.teaser: One evening Jesus made me see Hell. Oh, what a horrible sight!
Gemma.book: Autobiography and Letters of St. Gemma Galgani

Hildegard.name: St. Hildegard of Bingen
Hildegard.title: The Sibyl of the Rhine
Hildegard.teaser: In those days men will be lovers of themselves, and they will run after their own desires… they will say: Who is God, that we should obey Him? The pastors will become like wolves, not sparing the flock.

HolySpirit.name: Prayers before reading
HolySpirit.teaser: Do not quench the Spirit. Do not despise prophecies.

John.name: St. John Bosco
John.title: Father of Youth
John.teaser: I spent the whole next day worrying about the miserable night in store for me, and when evening came, loath to go to bed, I sat at my desk browsing through books until midnight. The mere thought of having more nightmares thoroughly scared me.

JohnV.name: St. John Vianney
JohnV.title: Curé d'Ars, Patron Saint of Priests
JohnV.teaser: B: It is true that they must reckon with this: the more someone sacrifices himself, the more we fight against him. That was the way it was for the priest Vianney.

Joseph.name: St. Joseph
Joseph.title: Terror of Demons
Joseph.teaser: JOSEPH — TERROR OF DEMONS After her comes her most chaste spouse, Saint Joseph, who—as we have already said—is, after her, the greatest saint in Heaven, after the Holy Trinity itself and the Immaculate Virgin. As a man, he is, after her, the purest, the greatest, far above all the saints.

Judas.name: Judas Iscariot
Judas.title: Human Demon, Former Apostle
Judas.teaser: THE BLESSED VIRGIN WISHES THAT THIS CURSED, FILTHY LITTLE BOOK BE WIDELY DISTRIBUTED. That is all there is to say.
Judas.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Judas2.name: Judas Iscariot
Judas2.title: Human Demon, Former Apostle
Judas2.teaser: IT IS I, JUDAS ISCARIOT, ONE OF THE TWELVE It is I who betrayed this great and incomparable Master. I saw with my own eyes what a pure and virtuous life He led.
Judas2.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Lidwina.name: St. Lidwina of Schiedam
Lidwina.title: The Patroness of Suffering
Lidwina.teaser: "No, sister," answered the angel, "but this part of Purgatory is bordering upon Hell." Looking around on all sides, she saw what resembled an immense prison, surrounded with walls of a prodigious height, the blackness of which, together with the monstrous aspect of the place, inspired her with ho...

Lucifer.name: Lucifer
Lucifer.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Seraphim
Lucifer.teaser: I AM LUCIFER, THE FATHER OF LIES. I was the most beautiful...

LuciferW.name: Lucifer
LuciferW.title: Angelic demon, from The Choir of Seraphim

MargaretMary.name: St. Margaret Mary Alacoque
MargaretMary.title: Disciple of the Sacred Heart
MargaretMary.teaser: When I was praying before the Blessed Sacrament on the feast of Corpus Christi, a person enveloped in fire suddenly stood before me. From the pitiable state the soul was in, I knew it was in Purgatory and I wept bitterly.

MariaMaddelena.name: Bl. Maria Magdalena Martinengo
MariaMaddelena.title: The Secret Stigmatist
MariaMaddelena.teaser: The Church will pass through a time of great trial, and many will lose the light of truth, following their own judgment instead of God’s will. Those who should guide others will themselves be in confusion, and thus many souls will be led into error.
MariaMaddelena.voice: Echo Rae - Expressive, Soothing and Warm

Mary.name: St. Mary of Ágreda
Mary.title: The Lady in Blue
Mary.teaser: The world will advance in malice, and men will give themselves over to their passions, forgetting the fear of God. Many who are called to guide souls will abandon the truth and walk in darkness, leading others with them.

Mary2.name: St. Mary of Ágreda
Mary2.title: The Lady in Blue
Mary2.teaser: At this discovery Lucifer and his demons were thrown into such fury and despair that they instantly wished to hurl themselves impetuously to the depths of hell, and strained all their powers to accomplish it in spite of the powerful Queen.

MaryMagdalen.name: St. Mary Magdalen de' Pazzi
MaryMagdalen.title: The Ecstatic Saint
MaryMagdalen.teaser: The Church is in great need of reform, for corruption has entered even among those who should be lights to others. The ministers of God do not seek His honor, but their own interests, and thus the people are led astray.

Nicholas.name: St. Nicholas of Tolentino
Nicholas.title: The Star of Tolentino
Nicholas.teaser: Then it seemed to him that he was transported into Purgatory. He saw an immense plain, where a vast multitude of souls, of all ages and conditions, were a prey to diverse tortures most horrible to behold.

None.teaser: Great Co-Redemptrix Summaries Plus Full Rosary / Seven Sorrows Chapters Full Dolorous Passion 2 Chapters Full Apocalypse Chapters Full Prophecies Chapters Imitation of Christ Life of St. Catherine Summaries Warnings Hell Is Terrible

Queen.name: The Queen of Heaven
Queen.title: Speaking to St. Mary of Ágreda
Queen.teaser: Rome will lose the faith and become the seat of the Antichrist. The Church will be eclipsed, the world will be in dismay.
Queen.caption: Rare Color Photograph of the Virgin Mary appearing in Hungary, 1989

Rita.name: Rita Bidermann
Rita.teaser: We Practically Put Her in Hell During These Prayers J: You have no idea how cruel hell is! You have no idea how horrible it is down there!
Rita.voice: Jerry B. - Evil, Villain, Horror, Thriller

Teresa.name: St. Teresa of Ávila
Teresa.title: The Doctor of Prayer
Teresa.teaser: A long time after the Lord had already granted me many of the favors I've mentioned and other very lofty ones, while I was in prayer one day, I suddenly found that, without knowing how, I had seemingly been put in hell.
Teresa.voice: Amber Quill: An Enchanting and Soothing Narrator

Thomas.name: Thomas A. Kempis
Thomas.title: The Little Hammer
Thomas.teaser: In the last days there shall be much tribulation and confusion among men; for they shall love themselves, and shall be proud, disobedient, and unthankful. The time will come when men will be so blind that they will take evil for good and good for evil.

Verdi.name: Verdi-Garandieu
Verdi.title: Human demon, former Abbott
Verdi.teaser: THIS BOOK WILL SAVE MANY SOULS, IT HAS AN INCOMPARABLE VALUE! Even if you do not see it.

Veroba.name: Veroba
Veroba.title: Angelic Demon, Choir of Powers
Veroba.teaser: CONFUSION HAS NOW BEGUN AND IS HEADING TOWARDS ITS CLIMAX. The time will come when whoever kills you will believe he is doing a holy duty for God.

Veronica.name: St. Veronica Giuliani
Veronica.title: The Giant of Holiness
Veronica.teaser: The Church is afflicted, and many who should defend her do not do so, for they seek themselves rather than God. There will come a time when confusion will be great, and even those who believe themselves strong will be shaken.
